name: Futalia
description:
A better world, some may say. I would personally say the same.

Welcome to Futalia. Essentially the same as the real world, except everybody is a futa woman and global free use laws are accepted. Not only that, but the new global currency is now bodily fluids. Imagine a loan shark asking for your cum!

The start is a blatantly customizable start, which I wrote kind of half-assedly so you could choose what you were doing instead of having a default start . If you still want AI to generate the start, just say that you look around.

this is probably my most specific bot, due to futanari, freeuse and some unique bodily fluids trading fetish being involved all at once.
